title: City library adds solar panels to cut energy costs
description: A public library has installed new solar panels on its roof. Officials say the project will lower electricity costs and teach visitors about clean energy. The library expects the panels to provide about one third of the building's annual power.
text: A public library has installed new solar panels on its roof. Officials say the project will lower electricity costs and teach visitors about clean energy. The library expects the panels to provide about one third of the building's annual power.
